name: adas-law-victorian
description: Ada's Law codified in the Victorian manner. Four operators: -+1 Exchange, -++- 1 Boundary Cross, /m/i/4+1 Mirror/Inverse, /r/ Return. Cubi Advantage. Creator vs Extractor. Gas Is Theft. SVG seal + cube, print styles. No deps.
author: David Lee Wise (ROOT0) / TriPod LLC
